home.heroTitle:
Lets build content systems that ship.
Fast, high-quality, human-led —
with AI where it helps
home.heroLead: I'm Ivan Nychyporuk — AI Media / Content Designer & Creator and AI integration consultant. I bring 15+ years of compositing craft from film and advertising into modern content pipelines.
home.profileTitle: AI Media / Content Creator / VFX Digital Compositor / AI Integration Consultant
home.profileBody: 15+ years of compositing craft in film and advertising, now applied to modern, AI-assisted content workflows.
home.highlightsTitle: A career built on visual precision
home.highlight1Body: VFX compositing and postproduction across international teams, with a strong eye for composition, color, and typography.
home.highlight2Body: Experience on productions including Netflix releases (credits available on request).
home.highlight3Body: Training and practice in AI-assisted text, image, video, audio, and web workflows — with human direction and quality control.
home.cap1Body: Short-form video, visuals, and copy — from idea to output, optimized for speed, consistency, and brand tone.
home.cap2Body: Workflow design, prompt libraries, QA standards, and tool selection that fit real teams and real deadlines.
home.cap3Body: Retouching, compositing, look development, and detail-level polish to keep output believable and coherent.
home.step2Body: Narrative, storyboard, and prompts — aligned to tone.
home.step3Body: Generate, edit, and iterate with tight version control.
home.step4Body: Visual checks, consistency, compliance, and polish.
home.step5Body: Final exports + guidelines so the system keeps working.
home.contactBody: Email is best for work opportunities and collaborations.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: For roles, projects, or partnerships: email is best. I can share additional materials on request.
